project_type: Next.js 16 music discovery app with App Router
build_system: bun (bun.lock present), Next.js 16.2.4, Tailwind CSS v4 via @tailwindcss/postcss
verification_instructions: 1. Run `bun run lint` to check ESLint. 2. Run `bun run build` to check TypeScript and build. Both must pass with zero errors.
setup_instructions: 1. Run `bun install` to install dependencies. 2. Run `bun run build` to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Use bun instead of npm (npm not available). No test runner configured. Next.js 16 with breaking changes from training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for latest API docs.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript must pass, ESLint must pass, build must succeed. Follow App Router architecture. Server Components preferred, Client Components only when needed. Responsive Tailwind CSS. Semantic HTML. Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard nav). No console.log in production. Performance optimized.
key_patterns: Glass morphism CSS classes in globals.css (.glass, .glass-elevated, .glass-search, .glass-dropdown, .glass-player). CSS custom properties for theming (--background, --foreground, etc). ThemeContext for dark/light mode. AudioPlayerContext for global audio state. FavoritesContext and PersonalizationContext for localStorage-backed state. iTunes API + Last.fm API for data. Components in app/components/. Lib functions in lib/. Dynamic routes use [id] folders.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - shared UI components (35 files). app/api/ - API routes. app/[route]/ - page routes. lib/ - utility libraries (API clients, localStorage helpers, types). types/ - TypeScript declaration files. public/ - static assets.
